settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your Boardsesh account, profile, and preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Customize how you appear on Boardsesh

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.hint: JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP. Up to 10MB — auto-compressed.

validation.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be less than 100 characters
validation.invalidInstagramUrl: Please enter a valid Instagram profile URL
validation.invalidImageType: Only JPG, PNG, GIF, and WebP images are allowed
validation.compressionFailed: Could not compress — please try a smaller image

preferences.title: Display Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Customize how grades and other data are displayed

appleHealth.label: Apple Health
appleHealth.switchLabel: Save sessions to Apple Health automatically
appleHealth.subtitle: Turn this off to save sessions only when you tap the Save to Apple Health button.

logbook.title: Your Logbook
logbook.subtitle: View and filter your logged climbs

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Delete your account?
dialog.warning: This is permanent. Your profile, draft climbs, logbook entries, and all other data will be deleted and cannot be recovered.
dialog.publishedClimbs_one: You have {{count}} published climb that will be preserved after deletion.
dialog.publishedClimbs_other: You have {{count}} published climbs that will be preserved after deletion.
dialog.removeSetterName: Remove my setter name from published climbs

deleteAccount.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

password.title: Email & Password Login
password.description: Set a password to log in with your email address. This is useful for browsers that don't support Google sign-in (e.g., the Boardsesh iOS app).
password.linkedProviderInfo_one: You're currently signed in with {{providers}}. Setting a password will not affect your {{providers}} login.
password.linkedProviderInfo_other: You're currently signed in with {{providers}}. Setting a password will not affect your social login.
password.success: Password set! You can now log in with your email and password.

validation.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.tooLong: Password must be less than 128 characters
validation.retryError: Failed to set password. Please try again.

controllers.title: ESP32 Controllers
controllers.subtitle: Register ESP32 devices to control your board via Bluetooth bridge. This allows you to use BoardSesh with official Kilter/Tension apps.
controllers.empty: No controllers registered. Add an ESP32 to use BoardSesh with official apps.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete controller
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this controller? This cannot be undone.

register.title: Register ESP32 Controller
register.description: Register a new ESP32 controller to receive LED commands from BoardSesh. You'll receive an API key to configure on the device.

apiKey.title: Controller Registered
apiKey.warning: This is the only time you'll see this key. If you lose it, you'll need to delete and re-register the controller.
apiKey.instruction: Enter this API key in your ESP32 configuration:
apiKey.copyError: Failed to copy - please select and copy manually

aurora.title: Board Accounts
aurora.subtitle: Link your board accounts to import your Aurora data to Boardsesh, or import from a JSON export file. We'll automatically sync your logbook, ascents, and climbs FROM Aurora every 12 hours. Data created in Boardsesh stays local and does not sync back to Aurora.

card.kilterShutdown: The Kilter backend has been shut down. You can import your data using an Aurora JSON export file, or email Aurora Climbing to request a data export.
card.notConnected: Not connected. Link your {{boardName}} account to import your Aurora data, or import from a JSON export file.

unlinkConfirm.title: Remove account link
unlinkConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to unlink your {{boardName}} account?

linkDialog.title: Link {{boardName}} Account
linkDialog.description: Enter your {{boardName}} Board username and password to import your Aurora data. Your credentials are encrypted and securely stored. Data syncs every 12 hours.
linkDialog.linkSuccess: {{boardName}} account linked. Your data will show up within 12 hours.

import.tooLarge: File is too large (max 200MB). Please check you selected the correct file.
import.parseError: Failed to parse JSON file. Please check the file format.
import.readError: Failed to read file. Please try again.
import.interrupted: Import was interrupted. The server may have timed out. Your data may have been partially imported.

dialog.previewNote: Climbs will be matched by name. Any that can't be matched will be reported after import. Re-importing the same file will not create duplicates.

kilterEmail.subject: Kilterboard data
kilterEmail.body:
Hey there!

Ex-app user here. I was wondering if I could get a copy of my data so I can save my logbooks and other data for personal tracking records.

My username is {{name}}, and this should be under this email ({{email}}).

Thanks!

{{name}}

feedbackDialog.errorRating: Couldn't send — we'll keep your feedback.

feedbackForm.bugPlaceholder: What were you doing? What did you expect vs see?

feedbackBanner.errorToast: Couldn't send — we'll keep your rating.

shakeToReport.disabledToast: Shake to report off. Tap your avatar up top to send feedback.

storeReview.title: Help others find Boardsesh
storeReview.body: Thanks for the rating. Would you also leave a quick review on your app store? It's the single best thing you can do to help other climbers find us.

sessionProvider.deepLinkError: Sign-in with Google, Apple, or Facebook may not work. Try restarting the app.

devUrlDialog.title: Dev URL
devUrlDialog.intro: Point the WebView at a different origin. The app will restart after saving.

validation.mustBeHttp: URL must start with http:// or https://

boardConfigMismatch.title: Board configuration doesn't match
boardConfigMismatch.intro: Our records show this board has a different config than you have configured.

bluetoothMismatch.switchNoAngleToast: Couldn't switch — open a climb at a specific angle first.
bluetoothMismatch.switchUrlFailedToast: Couldn't switch to that board's config. Try Connect anyway.
